jd_text: Main objective of the role is to support the Head of Auto Loans to steer the auto loan business and make FAB a top player in the market. Purpose of the role To support building an efficient auto loan business competitive in the market To help improve FAB market share in Auto business To streamline the entire journey from application to disbursal Work towards building a cutting-edge digital journey Manage end of dealer campaigns from system set up to signing agreements and communicating with internal/external stakeholders Provide necessary insights to Head of Auto Loans to prepare product strategy and product program from time to time
